recommendations.title: Pressure-test Cross-border B2B payment certainty
recommendations.why: It currently has the strongest whitespace score in this run.
recommendations.action: Create a one-page buyer brief: problem, audience, evidence, competitor crowding and a proposed Mastercard angle.

recommendations.title: Strengthen proof for Visa
recommendations.why: Proof Strength is the weakest visible metric for this brand in the current scoring set.
recommendations.action: Add named customers, quantified outcomes, partner announcements or analyst-grade evidence before making a client-facing claim.

recommendations.title: Keep the source list narrow for now
recommendations.why: A controlled source list makes the first version easier to trust, review and debug.
recommendations.action: Add 3 to 5 high-quality public URLs per brand before expanding automated discovery.
